mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_department (dept_name, contact_phone, location) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{contactPhone}, #{location})
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_department SET dept_name = #{deptName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, location = #{location}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_name, contact_phone, location, created_at, updated_at FROM hospital_department ORDER BY id
